business.name: Sydney Brewery Alexandria
business.address: Building 2/160 Bourke Rd, Alexandria NSW 2015, Australia

data.body:
Met my expectations in beer selections quality and food. This time I tried East coast IPA citrusy, fruity and freshing. Intensive food menu bit overpriced, don’t let the plates presentation fool you, it is tasty.
Well done on the beer quality

business.name: Sydney Brewery Alexandria
business.address: Building 2/160 Bourke Rd, Alexandria NSW 2015, Australia

data.body: Andre is an amazing host, made our group very welcome. Food is amazing, and the atmosphere was rockin

business.name: Sydney Brewery Alexandria
business.address: Building 2/160 Bourke Rd, Alexandria NSW 2015, Australia

data.body:
I have visited when nobody was there on Monday lol. Very huge place but nothing around.
We asked for the recommendation and the charming staff recommended summer ale and let us to try some. It would be good to visit in a large group.

business.name: Sydney Brewery Alexandria
business.address: Building 2/160 Bourke Rd, Alexandria NSW 2015, Australia

data.body:
Amazing beers & ciders!

We’ve had a lot of chilli prawn spaghetti in our time but theirs beats them all hands down!

Great service too!

Keep it up team 😀

business.name: Sydney Brewery Alexandria
business.address: Building 2/160 Bourke Rd, Alexandria NSW 2015, Australia

data.body:
10/10 place!

We are English and would say this is the best roast in Sydney we have found - all the trimmings and extras!

The venue is great, dog friendly, and all the staff are super friendly and helpful. Special shout out to Barney and Adam who were there the other day, but honestly they are all amazing.

This is our go-to and highly recommend!!

business.name: Sydney Brewery Alexandria
business.address: Building 2/160 Bourke Rd, Alexandria NSW 2015, Australia

data.body:
Such a lovely experience my boyfriend and I had! The staff were so polite and understanding about my allergy to seasme. I wanted to get the cheeseburger however they told me it had seasme seeds, they said they can put it on a tortilla wrap! Honestly such lovely views great place for a date night. One final thing the beer, can't get more fresher than that straight from the tank to the glass.

Highly recommend!

business.name: Sydney Brewery Alexandria
business.address: Building 2/160 Bourke Rd, Alexandria NSW 2015, Australia

data.body: Great food, excellent staff. Beer is superb. And very dog friendly

business.name: Sydney Brewery Alexandria
business.address: Building 2/160 Bourke Rd, Alexandria NSW 2015, Australia

data.body:
came in today at around 8:25, and received some of the best hospitality by (apologies as i didn’t get their names) a female working behind the bar and a male with her as well! They helped me out with what I needed, and were great for a chat! just for this service alone , ill be coming back as a returning customer !

Cheers for the water !
